meaning: adj.亚麻的,淡黄色的,亚麻色的
examples: My lighter are flaxen and transparent.
The flaxen brow arched again, You think so.
But who is the wistful, peach-skinned, flaxen-haired teenager?
One woman looks positively majestic in her green spandex leotard and wild flaxen hair, posing on a great white horse.
